text: This my tech work dey press my neck no be small. Dem dey use me do machine but the raba no even match my sweat. E no be only say my chest dey jump anyhow, my ginger don completely die. Abeg, wetin I fit do make I no run mad from this stress?

How you go take sabi say this your therapist wey you dey see, na him correct person wey fit carry your matter wella? And how I go take sabi how to 'tune' am, make e sabi wetin dey bite me for inside, so e go fit give me wetin my body and mind dey shout for from this treatment?

I love my guy well well, and I dey enjoy all di other other before sex. But when e come to di main action, di penetration part, my body go just dey do me one kind. I no sabi why, but I just dey pray make e finish quick. E dey feel like make I just dey cry. The thing be say all my gehs dey enjoy am, so I no understand why my own body dey different.
Wetin dey make better marriage stand gidigba wey e no go scatter?

E don reach like two months now wey me and am dey together. Everyday we go dey yarn, then him go just use small thing wey I talk vex scatter, and him go just ghost me, no dey pick my call, no dey reply my text. We get our sweet times sha, but me I just need to face my own hustle, and I feel like say him dey hold me down for that one. I still want am o, but no be now.

Me and my pikin papa don dey follow ourselves for like one year. We burst one serious kasala, initially e be like say e won settle am. But as time dey go, e begin carry our matter give outsiders, na im dem ginger am make e dust me. Now e dey tell me say make I wait for am make e brain touch ground. E won dey reason other babes, con show face back after four years. E no won face my wahala as I carry this belle. To even follow me go antenatal na war, zero care. Cold just dey catch my body, everywhere dark for my eyes cos I just dey all alone. Abeg how I won take run this matter?

My mind just dey give me kain kain thought wey I no want. E go just dey tell me say 'you no get value for anything.' I know say na my head dey cook am, but e just be like say na another person dey yarn am for my ear. Wetin dey do me self? How I go take pursue this kain thought comot from my head?

Omo, I carry my body go hospital today make dem run x-ray for my back. My bobo no even gree sit down wait with me. E prefer to go dey run errand for him guys as I dey there dey wait. When I finish, this guy still take extra 20 minutes before e show face come carry me. Now e no understand why my eye red, me and am just dey drag shadow over any small nonsense. E dey feel say I no get right to vex, but me I know say e fuck up and I get every reason to para.

My guy and I, our two families na church people o, but both of us don go astray before. Now, e hard am to accept my past, especially di fact say I no be virgin. Generally sef, the guy dey struggle to accept himself, talk less of other people. All this hin insecurity don dey cause gbege for our relationship. Abeg, how I go help am make e comot mind from my past so we fit face front?

Omo, loneliness just dey wire me. Man full my ground, but e be like say them just dey open ear, them no dey grab the matter at all. Them go just cast 'las las e go be', or them no even send my papa. Everybody dey cap say them dey my corner, but I swear e no show at all. Why e come be like say na only me waka come?
I get one guy wey me and am don relate before. E no even tey, we just turn tight paddy. I con go crash for his side over the weekend, now my main bobo dey para scatter. Abeg shey I fuck up?

Na me, small girl. My head don begin scatter, I no even sabi wetin I be again. I no know if na man I dey feel, or na woman, or both sef. All this my life, na man man I dey eye, but now, plenty kain question just full my head, and I just lost.

My heart dey heavy me gan, even when I see person for TV or for game. E just dey enter me for body like say na real pain I dey feel. Because of this, my life don turn yawa gan, no be small. I just dey feel say na this 'hyper empathy disorder' wey dem dey talk about dey worry me. But since na new sickness e be, I no fit see any tori about am anywhere. Shey na this thing dey cause all my wahala so?
Abi make we just find one place wey dem go check him head, something like all dis Yaba Left kind tinz.

Me and this babe don dey together for like four years. Both of us mess up, I no go lie, but omo, I still love her die. Now, she don pack go stay with another babe. My head dey tell me say she just dey use the girl pepper me, make I for dey miss her. How I go take know wetin really shele?

E get some heavy matter wey I package keep for chest, and I no know how I wan take run am. I no wan cast am give my wifey and my mama make I no go give them BP. But I no know how long I fit hold this thing inside. Wetin make I do? The thing don dey burst my head and my mind just dey cut anyhow. Abeg reason my matter, show me road.

Since my mama waka, my family people just dey do me one kind like say dem no sabi me again. Now my head dey worry say my papa go soon need to enter old people's home. If e happen so, na me one go carry this load for my head. Omo, wetin I go do? I really need my people to support me for this matter.
This dirty breakfast wey dem serve me dey scatter my head. Any small thing I see, na so so memory dey flash. Which scope I go use free my mind?

I get one guy wey me and am don date before. E no even tey, we just leave am turn tight paddy. I con go chill with am over the weekend, my bobo con dey para, e body dey bite am. Abeg, shey I fall hand?

I never cross 20, na me and my papa dey stay. Na only when I get lecture I dey comot house. E get time wey I go want reason my guys, but other times my body go just off, I fit lock up ghost everybody for days or even weeks. Sometimes my chest go heavy, I go dey feel say I be nobody or say my hand no fit ever do anything wey make sense. Shey na true dem dey talk, depression don hold me?

Me and my bobo don dey run things for one month now, and belle don dey ginger us like mad. Problem be say, work no dey, motor self no dey move for us. We never even shake body tell our mama and papa anything. Abeg, wetin be the way now? Who go save us from this tori?
As I yarn dem the matter, na so dem come use shout scatter my head.

Omo, I dey my early 20s and I still dey my papa house, reason be say pocket no strong to pack out. My mama con dey yarn say since I dey under her roof, na her law I gats dey follow. The woman just wan control my life patapata. Abeg, wetin pesin go do?

Sometimes ehn, body go dey sweet me to waka or jam people, but see other days, my chest go just dey gbim-gbim. Na so my mouth go lock pa, voice no go gree commot at all. I bin think say na normal level o, say maybe na just fear dey catch me, but omo, the other day, I siddon inside motor for almost 30 minutes before my liver fit carry me enter Target alone.

I don serve my guy breakfast after we run am for over 4 years. Deep down I know say na the right move, but as I dey solo so, body just dey do me one kain—I come dey feel needy anyhow. I get one person wey I dey catch cruise with now, but omo, my chest just dey cut. I dey mental with anxiety sake of say I wan know weda e reason my matter, plus this heavy craving for validation. Abeg, how person go take dey alright and get peace of mind on top him own level, whether relationship or hustle dey click or not?

Dis my small pikin wey dey primary school, to color something inside line sef, her hand no dey gree. If she wan write, all her writing go just gum together like say na one, except if she leave big big space or she dey jump line.

Everywhere just dey dark for my eyes tey tey. I dey try chest am, and na my bobo dey hold me down. Na only am I fit pour my mind for, but e don serve me breakfast say e no fit cope with the depression. Sapa choke, I no get shishi to go see therapist, so e feel say my matter don cast. Hospital money na cut-throat so I don enter one chance. E get time wey bad thoughts full my head to just end everything, I even wan resign my work. I no get anybody. My family no send my papa; dem pursue me comot for house since I turn 18. I get guys before, but everybody don face their front, nobody get my time. My ex dey try form saviour but e just dey worsen the matter, because anytime I see am or hear his voice, na so I go just burst cry. To crown am all, I just find out say dem no go promote me for work again because of this same depression.
Omo, depression wan finish me, my chest just dey heavy. How I go take see person yarn my matter give?

My mama and papa like say dem no send other kind love, but na only gay dem sabi talk about normally. If dem even knack mouth small about bisexuality, dem go dey talk rubbish like 'ah, dem go dey do any and any' or other kpata-kpata talk wey dey make my belle just dey turn inside, because me sef, na bi I be. I no sure if my mind don strong finish to open mouth tell dem my kain tin.

Some days body dey calm, I fit pull up or mingle with pipo. But see ehn, other days like dis? My heart go just dey cut gbigbigbi, word no go gree comot my mouth like say dem tie am. Since na so I just dey reason say na normal level, say maybe I just dey shake body. But omo, the other day, na almost 30 minutes I take sidon inside motor dey find liver to just enter Target by myself.

We no dey do long distance before o, na when e enter army our matter change. I feel the guy and I know say e dey feel me, but the parole get as e be. E don swear say e no go reason another babe, but my chest just dey cut. Abeg how I go take hold this relationship make e no cast?

I need to sabi why my vex dey too much, why I dey always wan claim people wey no be my own, and why bad bad thoughts dey full my head. My head dey always hot, every time. I don dey push people comot for my life no be small, now I fit just burst for person head if dem just ask me 'how your day?' I dey get this kind strong hold for person wey no even be my own. I dey get these strong strong mind to wound somebody bad bad. I wan see dem dey beg me make I stop the wound wey I dey give dem. I wan hear dem dey cry and shout like say dem wan die. Wetin dey do me sef?
I never even spend three months inside this marriage o. Week no dey pass wey we no go drag matter, and as the kasala dey strong dey go, e just dey heavy my chest.
See ehn, me and my ex him cousin don dey together for some years, the thing don even get head. But now the guy wan comot because people dey yab am say our pikin go still be my ex him blood.
I dey try package everything well make we no drag, but all na wash. The only time him body dey calm na when e don shack. My chest dey always cut anytime I reason say we go get wahala.

E don reach like 5 months now wey my ex just bounce, she no even yarn me wetin really sup. For my eye, the thing just be like film trick. No be say I still dey miss her like that o, but ehn, my mind no fit trust person again. Even my own padi dem wey we grow up together, even my family people sef. Fear just dey catch my body say people go judge me or just use me play. So instead make I dey form another person, I just lock up pata pata. Since when everything scatter, my body never settle, that peace of mind no dey again. I dey fear to even feel am, because I no want make dem snatch am from my hand again. E be like say any lesson wey I learn, na for only one day e dey last. My head just full. I dey work for one place wey I know say I suppose enjoy. I dey do my creative things, dey go gym, dey chop better food. I dey do everything wey the book talk, but nothing change for my body. Omo, I just tire. I no know wetin to do.
Omo, my eye dey see premium shege right now, my chest just dey heavy. My popsy and momsy wan scatter marriage, plus different yawa just dey gas back to back. I swear, I just wan off myself.
Shey this counseling matter sef dey really do anything wey fit help person head?
E be like say I be pure wahala, say my own just too much, but my babe dey talk say I dey alright. Me I no gree oh, I feel say na me just dey give everybody headache.

I know say I gatz face this depression wey dey press my chest. But I no sabi the format to take run am, and I no want cast my matter give anybody. How man fit clear depression lowkey wey another person no go know wetin dey sup?

To carry outside person na foul play wey my body no dey carry at all, but because of our two girls I say make I no scatter the home. But as e be now, the matter still dey pepper my heart, to forgive and forget dey hard me die. My mind no just touch ground with am again. If trust no dey, I no fit stay inside this relationship. Still on still, I no want make my pikin dem see shege. I swear, I no even know my left and right on top how to move forward.

Few night ago, I come yarn with one babe wey I sabi about my low self esteem for di first time. We yarn for hours, and she come dey tell me say I be correct guy, say make I no worry. She just dey tell me steady. She say I fine well well, say my character sweet die, di whole package. True true, my mind come dey calm down for my body by di time I wake up di next morning. But now, my head just full her! But I go travel go back to school small time, and my school far from her own, like 4 hours drive o. So now, my chest dey heavy me steady, because even if I tell her wetin dey my mind, e no go change anything. E no go even matter. I just dey helpless, my hand just dey tie, I no sabi wetin to do at all.
Dat counseling wey dem dey do, e dey really get use wey fit make pesin wey get wahala for head come better?

Like 5 months now don pass, my babe just japa she no even explain wetin sup. E just be like film trick for my eye. E no be say I miss am like before before, but to trust person again, e hard die. Even my own padi dem wey we grow up together, even my family people. My body dey always tell me say people go just look me finish or use me play. So instead make I dey form personality, I just lock up. Since that time wey things scatter, my body never calm down and I never happy with myself again. I dey fear to even try, because I no want make them collect am from my hand again. E be like say any lesson wey I learn, na for only one day e dey last. My head just blank. I no know wetin to do. The work wey I dey do, I suppose dey enjoy am. I dey try do my creative things, I dey go gym, dey chop better food. I dey do everything wey them say person suppose do, but my body just be one kind. Nothing change. Omo, I just tire. I no know again.

I just enter my early 20s, but I still dey my papa house cos sapa choke, I no fit pay rent. My mama don swear say as far say I dey under her roof, na her rules I must follow. The woman just dey try remote my life, the matter dey choke me. Abeg, wetin make I do?

Omo, my babe don serve me breakfast hot hot. She say she love me, but say the love no dey sweet her body again. The matter shock me, swear, because we bin dey okay. Wahala just start when she travel go Missouri go see her people. First week dey cool, but immediately she enter one of her sister house like this, story change. Na then she talk say feelings no dey again. I first reason say maybe na home sick dey worry am, because she talk say she no fit leave her family. She come tell me make I come meet am for Missouri. See mumu love na—I resign my work, carry my kaya, tell my people for Florida bye-bye, tear 15 hours drive straight to meet am. When I land, everywhere soft again. She beg, talk say she no mean am. We good for like one week, naso she change mouth again say she no get feelings. The thing wey dey scatter my head pass be say she get belle now. And no be mistake o, na we plan am together. I love this girl die. I treat am like egg. I bin even wan propose when she come back. Now family don go, my head don full. Man just confuse, I no know wetin I go do.

My husband wey we don marry for five years now, I don run am street like ten times. For my workplace, I dey form single. Of recent, the guy don dey suspect, but I dey use lie lie dey block am. E get as him sef bin dey follow babes online before, but my own now, e be like say my body no dey gree stay one place.

E don reach one month now, bad dream no dey let me rest and I dey hear voice wey dey pour terrible things for my ear. E no be say na just any voice o, na the voice of people wey I love and carry for head.

I just cop one hustle wey go make me japa far from base. Omo, me and my family need this raba die. Pipu dey yarn say na 'anxiety' dey do me, and I dey fear say my head fit scatter or my chest go just cut while I dey road. This kain tin na foreign behaviour to me. Abeg, wetin man fit do?

Lately, I just dey notice say death matter don dey full my head anyhow. E no be say I wan die o, and I no dey plan to commit suicide, no be that kain thing. Na just say I dey wonder wetin go happen if I just carry my load go meet ancestors, or if person wey I love well well just kpai. I just dey imagine how everybody wey know me go just dey cry, dey wail like small pikin, my belle go just turn. I know say e no worth am at all, and I wan live my life well well, get better future. Na just thinking sha. Even when I dey drive, sometimes my mind go just tell me make I free the steering and see wetin go happen, just dey go anyhow.

Anytime something just happen wey go make my body dey hot or wey go vex me, my mouth go just start to run, I go just dey yab the person finish. I go talk rubbish just make the vexation comot for my body. And if person come tell me something about my relationship, like dem dey carry rumor or dey talk anyhow, na so I go just face them, but the anger no go end there o. I go still carry am go meet my boyfriend. E be like say na me be the wahala, say na my character dey always bring gbege. I wan change. I wan learn how to let things slide, make e no dey enter my body, make I just dey happy, dey carry myself softly. My mouth dey wound the people wey I love. I wan better for myself, and for them too.

I be 17 and dis up and down don tire my life. Na my mama side I just won dey stay. Dis matter don show me pepper no be small. E get time wey my chest go just dey cut anyhow, I go dey think to end am, I even dey wound myself before. As I dey talk to you so, my mind no touch ground at all and my therapist no dey available. Abeg how I won take run am?

Me I be small babe. E get one kain dream wey I dey dream once once, since when I small. The koko now be say, I no dey remember wetin happen for the dream at all. But my body go just dey tell me say na the same one. Before I know, I go just wake up, fear go wire me, and I go dey cry dey shout loud loud, but I no even know the reason. Abeg, why this same dream dey always show? Why I no fit remember am, and how I go take remember wetin dey inside?
Omo, anytime wey winter set, my body go just dey do me one kain dull because of the weather. Which format man fit use run this p?

Omo, my pikin wey don almost finish primary school, to colour stay inside line na war, she go just scatter everywhere. If she dey write, all the words go just gum jam body, except say she leave big gap or jump line.

Dis my husband wey we don marry for five years, I don run am street like ten times now. For my workplace so, I dey do like say I be single pikin. Of recent, e body don dey tell am, but I just dey use lie cover my yansh. Himsef bin dey follow babes online sha, but my own now, e be like say this cheating thing don enter my blood.

I be Christian small girl, and my puna don break. My bobo sef be Christian small boy, but things just over-kaku sexually between us. I been plan say I go keep my body, but I tink say I no make am clear for am becos I sef get mind for am, and I even dey give am green light. We just continue to dey knack. E mean say God no plan am for me be dat? We still be small pikin, but dat one no stop me to dey dream say we go build future together. I just feel say God send am come my life for one big reason. I dey happy well well becos na him make I fit comot from many yeye relationship wey dem dey beat me. I love am gan.

From secondary school days, my guys dem and my family people, dem dey always eye me like say I be gay. I try to tell dem say no be so, but dem no gree hear word at all. E even be like say na wetin dem wan make I be, like dem dey force am on me. Now, my head don begin jam small, I dey begin believe their talk. I swear I know say I no be like that before, but as e be now, my head no settle again, I no sure at all.
E normal make person dey carry water for eye when dem dey therapy, abi na only me dey do am like dis?

Me and my oga don dey together since secondary school days. E don almost reach ten years wey we tie wrapper, and we get three fine pikin. Some weeks back, my husband just talk say e mind no settle, say e need breathing space, na so e carry e body go e papa house. E dey still come check the children, dey form like say nothing spoil. Abeg, shey we fit still patch this marriage or water don pass garri? E talk say e ready make we go see counselor, so e dey give me hope say e never totally wash hand comot for the matter.

I get one guy wey me and am don run things before. The thing no even tey, we just bone am enter normal tight friendship. I come go spend the weekend with am, now my boyfriend dey para scatter. Abeg, shey I fuck up?

Omo, wahala wey dey my neck no be here. Dem do me anyhow sexually back in the days, I drag life with breast cancer survive am, and since I born, sleep and my eye no dey gree. Depression don tie wrapper for my body tey tey, and now my heart just dey cut anyhow. I no dey value myself at all, but body still sweet me inside my marriage of almost 35 years. I never carry all this load go meet therapist before. Abi my matter don over choke for counseling?

Two months don carry me reach for this relationship with am. My past ehn, e get too much wahala wey dey always ginger am, dey make his body hot. Abeg, e get right to dey hold me for neck for wetin I do before e even know my name?

Omo, na this PTSD dey do me. The thing don scatter my head soteh e dey affect my body for bed, I just dey vex anyhow and e dey spoil my relationships. Dem even don sack me from work since last month. How person go take get him life back?
I don show face for therapy like two-three times now, but omo, anytime I wan enter, my body go just dey shake one kain. Shey dis tin normal? I suppose still dey feel laidis?
Fear dey just catch me steady, and I no even know why. E come be like say I no fit do anything on my own again, because I dey always fear how the thing go turn out.

How I wan take give myself joy without the exact people wey dey sweeten my inside? As dem don dust so, my chest just dey heavy, everywhere dark. Two months don waka pass but I never still balance, to chest this life on my own just dey hard me.

My pikin dey complain say some kind wicked wicked thoughts and dream dey scatter him head. No be say e wan wound person o, but e go just dey see as terrible terrible things dey happen to people wey e love. E come dey explain one dream for me di oda day, di thing violent soteh my belle wan comot. E pass any horror film. E say e no fit control am, say di thoughts just dey enter him head fiam! Abeg, make una help me!

My wife don turn am to work to dey accuse me say I dey carry another woman. And she go dey yarn say I dey do tins wey dey carry her kpako for ground, even if my mind no carry am go there. E get as I just call babe for office 'sweetheart', na so vex go full everywhere. Ah, if na money dem dey pay for every time she don open mouth say I dey cheat, I for don build house for Lekki by now, no cap! To talk say she wrong? E no dey her dictionary, my guy! Even if you beg am with all your body, e no go gree. Abeg, wetin I go do make this woman come get sense for head?
My mama dey look after my sister pikin wey she just dump for her hand. Every day she go dey call me dey complain, abeg my head no fit carry the talk again.
My mama na she dey look after my sister pikin wey she just run leave. Every blessed day the woman go dey call me dey complain, but me eh, my head no fit carry the mata again.
Wetin be the koko things wey better counselor suppose sabi?

Normally, I be person wey dey vibe well well, but e get times wey my mouth go just lock. I no even want follow person talk at all. E be like say I dey find the word for my head but nothing dey come out. Sometimes I dey wonder if na so so fronting I dey front with all this my social parole, just to hide. I no know if people even rate am. My body dey always do me one kind, I dey feel say people dey talk about me, and that thing go just make me bone face, I no go wan yarn again.
E get as e be, for one night di tin fit show like 3 times.

Me and my hubby, we no dey for house together again, we don waka separate ways. E say e need time to clear e head, say make e just chill on e own small. E say e wan feel that fire wey dey make person ginger for relationship again, but e no wan totally comot me for e life. Abeg, wetin I go do now? Make I just dey wait for am like mumu, or make I just carry my two left leg go find my happiness?

Omo, one kin bad spirit dey push me make I sidon look another man dey nack my wife. I don yarn am the matter, and she talk say she go run am for me. If I reason am, my body go just dey do me giji-giji with sweet, but I no wan run am cus my belle dey turn me, e dey irritate my soul finish. How I go take off this yeye urge, abi make I just cast am free body do the tin? I don drag this matter for years, e no gree comot for my brain. Before I forget, I dey my mid 30s and my wife dey her mid 40s.
E con reach when family gather for something like burial, everybody just get their own different way and e dey weak person.

My mind go just dey carry me go something wey no even matter, or bad thing wey don happen tey tey. Na so I go just dey cry, dey vex pull my hair, cover my ear strong strong, knack myself small, con dey throw everything wey I see. If I enter loud place for outside, my body go just dey hot me, I go come dey talk sharp sharp, con dey vex for no reason. I get fear wey no be small fear say person go just commot for my life (wey na wetin dey always happen sha), and I just dey feel like say I too dey follow person.

E be like say my people dey cool with all dis gay matter, but normally na only gay people dem dey talk about. Anytime dem come mention bisexual people, dem go dey talk say "those ones na anything for anything" or other kain talk wey dey just weak my body, because me sef I be bi. I no even know if my mind don reach to tell dem.

My mama and papa like say dem dey okay with other sexualities sha, but na only gay matter dem dey always yarn. When dem come talk about bisexuality, dem go dey talk say "dem go do anything" or other tori wey dey make my body dey scratch me because me sef na bisexual I be. I no know if my mind don settle well to open up to dem.

My mind no dey settle for my life. I no trust say my wife truly want us, even as she dey yarn say she want. Na to dey drink don be my escape to calm all dis plenty wahala wey dey hide for my head and other tin dem. I don dey drink pass for some years now. I feel say no be say I just like to drink, but because my body no dey calm lately, e just dey always on edge. Na so so cry I dey cry for films wey I don dey watch for years, and e no even make sense to me. My head dey always tell me say something bad go happen if I drive for main road. Even small noise go just make me jump anyhow.

Me and my pikin dey with my ex-pikin papa sister and her husband. We don spend five years there so. Dem be Hispanic people and dem dey always follow my pikin talk dia language. Sometimes, dem dey cross dia boundary as aunty and uncle, com dey put mouth for my role as mama. Dem no just dey see am, but me, I dey see am clear, and e dey show for my pikin behavior. My pikin dey see dem like stable people, but e dey vex say her papa no dey. My mind dey tell me say e dey blame me small small, because e no know say her papa na confirm drunkard.
My mama dey look after my sister pikin wey she just dump. She dey call me every day dey complain, but omo, my head no fit carry am again.
My person don dey burst my head lately say e dey shame am die as I no dey follow him family and him padi dem yan. Me, I just feel say na because I no get him kind ginger for social life like am.

I no know wetin I go do. I need that closure o, if not, I no go fit move on from this matter. I no know wetin him be, but him just dey turn my head. My body just dey do me one kind, fear-fear dey catch me well-well and I no even know why. E come be like say I no fit do anything on my own because I dey reason wetin go happen for front.

No vex abeg, but e dey make my head spin sometimes, I no fit sabi wetin real or fake. E dey be like say everybody just dey lie, dey yarn dust. So how I go take know say even God self, no be part of all that lie-lie wey dem dey throw?

"Like two and a half months ago, I see one babe for dating site. We com go out two times, but even though she get plans say make we take am small small, I still land for her house on one Friday night, just one week after our first outing. We try our best not to knack, but after plenty hours of struggling, we just give up and we knack. After we knack finish, I com dey sleep for her house every night for almost two weeks straight. Then one day, she travel go her family house for Thanksgiving, and na so everything just scatter. For the short time wey we dey together, we come really close and serious fast fast. We feel say we don finally see each other. We dey tell each other 'I love you' all the time, even when we dey knack. A few days after Thanksgiving, she con tell me say we go need to go back to her first plan, say we no go dey see each other often again. My mind pain me gan, and I no understand wetin dey happen. Then another one week later, she con tell me say she no fit continue again, at all at all. My heart just burst! Small days later, she con dey tell me say she miss me gan and say 'make we meet for lunch' or something like that. Then after almost two weeks, we finally link up one night and we just hot for each other gan (no be only sex o, na love), but she con open up say the reason for the sudden distance na because the papa of her small pikin tell her say him want make dem get back together, and this thing just scatter her head. So because of her pikin, she con dey think say make she just agree to am. She don tell me everything about the guy before, and e clear say she no even get small feeling for am, but she wan put herself for suffering again just because of her pikin. We know say we love each other gan, but she just dey confused and no know wetin to do. She no even believe say dem fit work out because she don pursue am before for not doing his papa duty well. I know say she need time, so me I just dey try take care of myself. We don agree say make we just be friends, and if this thing no work out for her, we go try again. I love her kpatakpata, and my heart just dey bleed."

I don show for like two therapy session now o, but anytime wey I wan step inside, my body go just dey do me one kain, I go start to dey shake. Shey dis tin normal so? I suppose still dey feel this kain way?

[My sister, my head wan scatter. As I be big girl for my papa house so, I no even know who I be again. The whole wahala start like 10 months ago wey I get one boy. We date for some months before we come begin follow body. Dat time ehn, I be proper church girl, but I still gree do am. I no even know why. My body come dey do me one kain, like say I do bad thing, but na because I know say my people no go like am. My parents na serious Holy Ghost fire Christians. Any small time wey the boy come my house, we must do something. Nothing dey to do for house, so if we just dey watch film for inside room, body go just dey tell us to do things.
One day, my papa see my message, come know everything wey I dey do with the guy. Sharp sharp, e don tell my mama. The two of dem vex no be small. Dem talk say the boy wan just use me collect, say na my pant e dey find, say him no be Christian. I hear their advice, I break up with the guy. After one month wey we break up, school start, I come go back to the boy. My people sha later find out, but this time, I no send dem. I go dey gist my boyfriend everything wey dem dey talk about am: how e no be my husband material, how God no gree for am at all. Sometimes I go try break up with am, but las las, I no dey ever hear wetin my parents dey talk. Dem go just dey shout for my head say make I leave the boy. I just feel say I don too old for this kind parole.
Now I just hang. The real me, shey na church person I be? Abi this boy don wash my brain? I no dey follow my parents talk about am again, and because of dat one, dem believe say I dey do corner-corner. Dem don threaten me say if I still dey with am, I no go do track again and dem no go support me with anything. Dem don call me ashawo, now dem dey call me devil worshipper. Dem say my boyfriend dey carry me comot from their hand. But the thing be say, this boy dey make me happy die. Dem still talk say the life wey I dey live for house different from the one for school. Dem say dem want the best for me and dem love me because na dem adopt me.]

E just dey be me like say anytime I do something wey person ask me, e no dey ever reach. As I just finish am, for their mind, dem go dey reason say na another person dem for give the work. My body go just dey tell me say dem no want make I follow them do anything again.

Whether na man or woman, my body dey always weak me when I wan open mouth yarn. I dey fear make dem no use me laugh, or say I no go fit measure up. Even as I just dey waka for road, my head go just dey scatter, dey tink say my face no arrange, my body no set, all those kin' tin'.

Omo, na so so dirty thoughts just dey run for my head, and e dey vex me die because e don dey scatter my relationship. My hand just tie, the guilt dey choke me. I want make this yeye thing leave my body, make I fit make my babe happy again.

Di oga just dey barge enter house anytime e wan see him pikin dem. My woman dey tell me say di whole matter dey weak her body, but e be like say fear dey catch her to yarn the guy anything. Abeg, shey e make sense as e dey do so?

Guy, dem rape me some months back. Since that time, on top other kain-kain wahala wey still happen, my body just weak. I no dey feel anything for my mind again. E come be like say my heart na stone, nothing dey even move me sef. Abeg, how I go take change this thing?

I just collect one hustle wey go make me travel far from base. Me and my family need the work die. People dey tell me say na 'anxiety' dey worry me, and cold dey catch me make my chest no go lock or my heart start to do gbaga-gbaga for road. I never face this kind p before. Abeg, wetin I fit do?

My parents dey yab me everyday for my pikin front, e dey fall my hand. E be like say I don enter trap, no way to comot. I just gats dey hear all the rubbish wey dem dey talk, dey swallow everything. I need to learn how I go take manage, especially as I no get anywhere else to go. My head just full, my body don tire. Abeg, how I go take handle this wahala?

My husband get alcohol palava before, e don tey small (but e no go ever gree say na so). Sometime before (like 3 years ago sha), I tell am make e stop to dey drink too much, and e gree. One night, I just catch am dey drink for my back. I face am, and e lie, but I tell am say I know say e dey lie because I count the beers for fridge, four of dem no dey. E gree say na true, e beg me, and promise say e no go do am again. Recently now, my husband don dey drink small small, but I notice say na every night e dey drink. I no like am at all. For New Year resolution, we talk say we go reduce how we dey drink alcohol. E gree join, say no more drinking every night. The other night, I just count the beers for fridge to check if some no dey. E take some days sha, but tonight, I just see say some no dey, even with one shot of vodka. E don faint for couch when I say make I wake am face am (na bad time sha, but I no fit wait). I ask am if e go come sleep with me for bed (when e dey drink, e dey snore gan, I no fit sleep, na hin sign be dat say e don drink). E just dey talk for inside mouth small, say no. I ask am if e don drink, but e just vex talk say no. I just enter our room go sleep, leave am for couch. I no sure if I dey do too much or not. I just feel say I dey sincere with am for everything, and I expect make e too dey sincere. Apart from dis one, e be good husband for every other thing.

Sometimes body go dey to waka or jam people, but some days ehn, my mind go just dey cut and words no go gree commot my mouth like say voice don lock. I bin think say na normal level, say maybe na just shaking, but that day so, omo I sidon inside motor for almost 30 mins just to gather liver enter Target by myself.
Dis breakup mata don really enter my head. Everywhere I turn, na so-so memories dey rush my brain. How person go take comot am for mind?
Body just dey heavy me, I no even feel myself at all. Nothing dey sweet me do again.

My ginger don kpafuka finish. E be like say bed don gum my body. I no just know wetin to do again, my head just dey fail me. My body no well at all, I dey feel am for my chest. Dat kain worry-worry and bad belle don tie my life for road.

I just dey follow my bestie talk anyhow and my head no dey carry why. But as I come reason am, e be like say na the way my mama dey always do me strong-thing dey cause am. Shey e fit be say na from there the problem dey come?

I don enter my late 50s. Matter of love never reach my side; I no give, nobody show me. The kind strong help wey my soul need pass wetin dey inside this our small town, but my chest go just dey cut to comot outside, fear no let me travel. Hope don dey finish for my body completely. My brain no dey carry load again, memory don cast, I go forget wetin happen just now. My life no get one single meaning. I no fit do any better work or anything wey get head, and na so I just be since I born. I be pure waste of time and space, but I still dey struggle. For wetin exactly? Why God just force me make I still dey alive? No be say I wan drink sniper oh, body just tire me dead.
My love matter don dey carry body, proper wahala! I gats ginger up and fix am sharp-sharp before she carry her leg comot for my life. How I go learn to dey listen well and con sabi gather my senses?

Me and dis guy don work together for like three years now, and from the first day wey my eye see am, I know say the guy dey enter my eye. Small small, we come be tight paddies, we dey gist about our relationship wahala, our family people, our dreams for future, all those things. Small toasting dey always dey between us, na so one day, just recently, mata come go another level, we come dey kiss. We gree say we go keep am on a low, and we do am, but for my mind ehn, I dey hope say e go turn to serious thing. E no happen. And now, three months after, the thing still dey my body. I dey try my best make we just remain friends because na wetin he want be dat. We no dey the same office again, and I been think say dat one go help me forget the feelings, but we still dey talk work matter, and the guy dey always touch me. E just dey make my body weak for am. The guy too like to hug person and e sweet die, so my head dey always travel, dey think of wetin for happen and wetin still fit happen, but e clear say the guy no send me. E small pass me and na soji girls with figure 8 e dey like, but sometimes my eye dey catch am as e dey size me up, and the thing dey give my heart ginger. Abeg, how I go take comot this guy for my head and we go still remain paddies?

I don always conclude say my head no carry better package. Now wey things don actually dey make sense, fear dey catch me. All my life nobody send me, I just believe say I go lonely finish. I just jam one correct babe wey her eye really enter my matter, but the thing dey do me one kind for body. E don dey give the two of us headache now.
I dey use my own hand wound myself, then I go free am small. But once I just see anything wey cast my mood, my body go just dey scratch me to injure myself back.

As I dey so, I no get any confirm guy. The babe wey I get just dey mizz me, but she love me die. I dey bone am, she sef dey bone. Our parol don cast, we dey break up and I just dey O.Y.O—nobody dey for me.
Plenty men don spoil my body, now my own body dey fall my hand die. I con dey wear all these lingerie things, just to ginger myself make body fit rise before I meet my wife.
I dey learn work for dis swimming instructor tinz but money no reach to buy correct costume. Na so one boy for my class come tell me say my chest just dey outside. Ah, shame wan kill me die.

Anytime wey I no tell my people wetin I do, even all these small small things wey no even matter, my body go just dey heavy me. E go be like say something dey chop me for inside belle, and e no dey comot until I wound myself.
Na so she burst cry say she no fit trust me again patapata. Right now my body just dey somehow, e be like say dem chook me knife for chest. Abeg, wetin I suppose do?

Omo, I just dey feel like zero, like say my life never move, frustration wan burst my head. E dey do me make I scatter everywhere, wound myself, tear race, shout, just dey bawl. I swear, I just wan dey jolly and show face like before. Make I fit stand well for my pikin, make life soft.
